sections.biography-source-undefined: Zhang Da was a “tent general”, a personal subordinate, of Zhang Fei. Zhang Fei was notorious for physically abusing his soldiers and officers; Zhang Da was presumably one such victim. Liu Bei warned Zhang Fei not to keep the men that he hurt in his service, but Zhang Fei kept Zhang Da. When Liu Bei attacked Sun Quan in 221 CE, Zhang Fei was to lead ten thousand men from Langzhong to join him at Jiangzhou. However, Zhang Da, along with fellow officer Fan Qiang, assassinated Zhang Fei. They then took his head and sailed rivers in fleeing to Sun Quan.

full_text:
Zhang Da 張達
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Da (張達). Assassinated Zhang Fei with Fan Qiang, bringing the head to Wu. Zhang Da was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wu Kingdom.

BiographySource Undefined
Zhang Da was a “tent general”, a personal subordinate, of Zhang Fei. Zhang Fei was notorious for physically abusing his soldiers and officers; Zhang Da was presumably one such victim. Liu Bei warned Zhang Fei not to keep the men that he hurt in his service, but Zhang Fei kept Zhang Da. When Liu Bei attacked Sun Quan in 221 CE, Zhang Fei was to lead ten thousand men from Langzhong to join him at Jiangzhou. However, Zhang Da, along with fellow officer Fan Qiang, assassinated Zhang Fei. They then took his head and sailed rivers in fleeing to Sun Quan.
